examples: How can you, so young, compare yourself to Herakles?
Detail of Herakles battling the nine-headed serpent Hydra from a depiction of his twelve labours.
In a case alongside him stands a 20-inch marble statuette of a much younger Herakles, beardless, sleek and classically muscled in the late Athenian manner.
The emergency tug, Herakles, attached a line to the helicopter, to protect the aircraft from the swell, and coastguards have been broadcasting hourly navigational warnings to nearby shipping.
